product_overview: AI Image Studio is a zero-cost AI image tools platform built on Next.js, Supabase, and Hugging Face Inference API. It provides production-grade image generation and editing tools plus an advanced admin dashboard for controlling models, prompts, limits, and API keys.
core_goals: Deliver a professional AI image tools suite with minimal operational cost
Use Hugging Face Inference API and Supabase-backed settings instead of paid third-party services
Provide an admin dashboard to manage AI models, prompts, output dimensions, and rate limits
Support reliable image editing workflows including generation, cleanup, upscale, reimagine, uncrop, and background operations
Ensure the app remains configurable and maintainable through database-backed settings

features.name: AI Image Generation API
features.description: Core backend AI endpoints that generate and transform images using Hugging Face models and configurable settings.
user_flows: POST /api/text-to-image with a valid prompt and configured settings -> Receive 200 with generated image response -> Display the generated image to the user
POST /api/text-to-image with missing prompt or invalid settings -> Receive 4xx error response with validation details -> Prompt the user to correct the request
POST /api/cleanup with a source image and configured inpainting settings -> Receive 200 with cleaned image response -> Present the restored image to the user
POST /api/cleanup with an invalid image file -> Receive 4xx error response -> Show upload or format validation feedback
POST /api/upscale with a low-resolution image and configured model settings -> Receive 200 with upscaled image response -> Return the enhanced image to the user
POST /api/upscale with unsupported image input -> Receive 4xx or 5xx error response -> Show processing failure feedback
POST /api/reimagine with a valid image and style settings -> Receive 200 with a reimagined image response -> Show the variation result to the user
POST /api/reimagine with an empty request body -> Receive 4xx error response -> Inform the user that an image is required
POST /api/uncrop with an image and expansion settings -> Receive 200 with expanded image response -> Return the outpainted image to the user
POST /api/uncrop with a malformed image payload -> Receive 4xx error response -> Display a request formatting error
POST /api/remove-background with a valid image file -> Receive 200 with image/png background-removed output -> Show the transparent-background image to the user
POST /api/remove-background with a non-image file -> Receive 4xx error response -> Display an upload type validation error
POST /api/replace-background with a valid image file and prompt -> Receive 200 with image/png output containing the new background -> Present the composited image to the user
POST /api/replace-background with missing prompt or image -> Receive 4xx error response -> Display required-field validation feedback

features.name: AI Image Generation API
features.description: Core AI endpoints powered by Hugging Face API
